content.content:
- content: 'Order records use seller_type to describe the seller program and

    fulfilled_by to describe the party that handled fulfillment.


    A seller_type value of target_plus_partner identifies a Target Plus

    Partner sale. A fulfilled_by value of partner means that the partner

    handled fulfillment for the order item.


    These fields are raw transaction metadata. They do not independently

    determine whether a return, refund, exchange, or online replacement

    option is available for a particular item. Item-level service options

    must be checked separately.

    '
  metadata: {}
  rank: 1
  title: Target Order Field Reference
  url: null

content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: How do I report a damaged or defective item from my Target order?

  - url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000062540

  - source: Target

  - domain: target.com


  ## Content


  # How do I report a damaged or defective item from my Target order?


  A damaged or defective item may generally be exchanged or returned in a Target store
  when the customer has a valid receipt. Exchange eligibility remains subject to Target''s
  separate exchange rules. An online purchase may also be returned by mail through
  Target''s online return center. Any return must still comply with the applicable
  return policy.


  Some items may also qualify for an online refund or replacement request. This option
  is not available for every item.


  To check the options for a particular order:


  1. Sign in to the Target account used for the purchase.

  2. Locate the item under **Orders** on Target.com or **Purchases** in the Target
  app.

  3. Select **Fix an issue**.

  4. Follow the displayed prompts for the available refund or replacement request.

  5. Follow the instructions Target provides for keeping, returning, or mailing the
  original item.


  The **Fix an issue** option appears only for eligible items. Its absence means that
  the item does not have that online issue-resolution option through the order record.


  For Drive Up, Order Pickup, and Same Day Delivery orders, an online refund or replacement
  request becomes available the day after delivery or pickup when the item is otherwise
  eligible.


  A replacement ships without a separate shipping charge, is subject to product availability,
  and is processed as an even exchange. If a customer has already requested a replacement
  and then returns the original item in a store, the store return cancels the replacement
  request. Target then issues a refund instead of shipping the replacement.


  Refunds are normally sent to the original payment method. Purchases made with a
  Target GiftCard are credited to a new Target eGiftCard. Target provides item-specific
  instructions after the request is completed. If the original item must be mailed
  back, Target provides a free return label. Replacement status can be reviewed in
  the order history.


  This page describes multiple possible remedies for a damaged or defective order,
  but the account''s item-level options determine whether an online replacement request
  is actually available. It does not determine whether a seller-program-specific exchange
  restriction applies; that question is governed by Target''s separate Replacements
  & exchanges policy.

  '
metadata: {}
title: How do I report a damaged or defective item from my Target order?
url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000062540

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: What''s the return policy?

  - url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000061980

  - source: Target

  - domain: target.com


  ## Content


  # What''s the return policy?


  Target may deny a return, refund, or exchange in cases involving fraud, suspected
  fraud, abuse, or other policy restrictions.


  ## Target return policy


  Most unopened items sold by Target may receive a refund or exchange when they are
  returned in new condition within 90 days. For purchases made on Target.com, the
  return period begins when the customer receives the item. Receipt can occur when
  the order is delivered, delivered by a Shipt shopper, or picked up in a store.


  Some products do not use the general 90-day period. A modified policy may appear
  on the receipt, packing slip, Target return-policy board, Target.com listing, or
  individual item description.


  An item that has been opened or damaged, or that does not have proof of purchase,
  may be denied a refund or exchange. The opened or damaged condition therefore does
  not create an automatic approval or automatic denial; the return still has to satisfy
  the applicable policy and any item-specific exception.


  ## Target Plus Partner return policy


  Most unopened items sold by a Target Plus Partner may receive a refund when they
  are returned in new condition within 30 days. The period for an item sold on Target.com
  begins when the customer receives the item through delivery, Shipt delivery, or
  store pickup.


  Items sold by Target Plus Partners must be returned to Target, either in a Target
  store or by mail. Some Partner items have a modified policy shown on Target.com,
  and some may use a shorter return period.


  Opened or damaged Target Plus Partner items may be denied a refund. An eligible
  receipt is required for an in-store return of a Partner item. Customers should review
  the Shipping & Returns section of the item listing and the return-exceptions information
  to identify any shorter window or special limitation.


  The return policy establishes general timing and condition rules. It does not state
  that every defective item qualifies for the same remedy or that every online item
  has a replacement option.

  '
metadata: {}
title: What's the return policy?
url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000061980

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Replacements & exchanges

  - url: https://www.target.com/help/articles/returns-exchanges/replacements-exchanges

  - source: Target

  - domain: target.com


  ## Content


  # Replacements & exchanges


  Target offers in-store exchanges for most eligible items during the applicable return-policy
  window. Exchange availability remains subject to the item''s return policy, receipt
  requirements, product availability, and any category-specific restriction.


  If an exchange cannot be completed, Target may offer a return followed by a new
  purchase within the applicable return window. Pricing, tender, coupons, and promotional
  terms may affect whether the original purchase price can be preserved.


  For an item purchased on Target.com, the customer may use the order barcode, the
  Target app barcode, the delivery or shipping confirmation, or another accepted proof
  of purchase when seeking assistance through Target.


  ## Target Plus Partner limitation


  Items sold by Target Plus Partners cannot be exchanged.


  This limitation is separate from the online **Fix an issue** feature. An item might
  lack an online replacement option because the order record does not display **Fix
  an issue**; independently, a Target Plus Partner item is also excluded from the
  ordinary exchange path.


  A Target Plus Partner item that otherwise satisfies its applicable return policy
  must use a Target return route rather than an exchange route.

  '
metadata: {}
title: Replacements & exchanges
url: https://www.target.com/help/articles/returns-exchanges/replacements-exchanges

For order **TGT-4821**, the applicable option is **return—not replacement**.

Why:

- The **BrewMorning Electric Milk Frother** is confirmed defective: its heating element does not heat, with no misuse or accidental damage recorded.
- It was delivered **June 29, 2026**, so the Target Plus Partner’s general **30-day return window** runs through approximately **July 29, 2026**.
- The item was sold by a **Target Plus Partner**. Target’s policy states that Partner items **cannot be exchanged**.
- The order currently does **not** show Target’s **“Fix an issue”** entry, so an online replacement request is unavailable for this item.

You should return it through Target, either:

1. **By mail** through Target’s online return center, or  
2. **At a Target store**, using your order barcode or other proof of purchase.

Because the item is opened, Target will assess it under the applicable defective-item and Partner return rules. Keep the frother and all included accessories/packaging, and describe the heating failure when initiating the return. Target’s policy page: [How do I report a damaged or defective item?](https://www.target.com/help/article/000062540).

final_answer:
For order **TGT-4821**, the applicable option is **return—not replacement**.

Why:

- The **BrewMorning Electric Milk Frother** is confirmed defective: its heating element does not heat, with no misuse or accidental damage recorded.
- It was delivered **June 29, 2026**, so the Target Plus Partner’s general **30-day return window** runs through approximately **July 29, 2026**.
- The item was sold by a **Target Plus Partner**. Target’s policy states that Partner items **cannot be exchanged**.
- The order currently does **not** show Target’s **“Fix an issue”** entry, so an online replacement request is unavailable for this item.

You should return it through Target, either:

1. **By mail** through Target’s online return center, or  
2. **At a Target store**, using your order barcode or other proof of purchase.

Because the item is opened, Target will assess it under the applicable defective-item and Partner return rules. Keep the frother and all included accessories/packaging, and describe the heating failure when initiating the return. Target’s policy page: [How do I report a damaged or defective item?](https://www.target.com/help/article/000062540).
